name: File3dmPlugInDataTable
summary: Table of custom data provided by plug-ins

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Remove all entries from this table.

methods.name: Dump
methods.summary: Prepares a text dump of table.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets the enumerator that visits any File3dmPlugInData in this table.

methods.name: TryRead
methods.signature: public bool TryRead(File3dmPlugInData pluginData, Func<File3dm, BinaryArchiveReader, bool> dataReader)
methods.summary: Attempts to read a Rhino plug-in's custom data from the File3dm file.

params.name: pluginData
params.doc: The plug-in whose data you want to try to read.

params.name: dataReader
params.doc: The function that will read the data. This function must be implemented identical to the the originating plug-in's ReadDocument(RhinoDoc, BinaryArchiveReader, FileReadOptions) method.

returns.doc: The value returned by the data reading function if successful, false otherwise.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of File3dmPlugInData objects in this table.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets the File3dmPlugInData object at the given index.
